title: Section 25
content: (1) Where it is not practicable to seize any goods which are liable to confiscation under this Act, any officer authorised under section 23 may serve on the owner or person in possession of the goods, an order that he shall not remove, part with or otherwise deal with the goods except with the previous permission of such officer. (2) For effecting seizure and confiscation, the owner, the plant operator and other officials of the facility shall provide all assistance with regard to safety in handling of goods.
